atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind base, components, and utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Applies existing utility classes inline inside CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Places custom styles inside Tailwind's layer system.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Applies styles at configured Tailwind breakpoints.
